BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if current period exists--- if not then create it ---

Values.value: Current Period is found for challenge - %challengePeriods/challengeId%

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if Eff From and To from backend match with the DB data---

MAP.NAME: %policyStartDate% == %challengePeriods/periodEffectiveFrom% && %policyEndDate% == %challengePeriods/periodEffectiveTo%
MAP.COMMENT: -- From and To dates are same Do Nothing ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Update periods as Eff From and To do not match ---

MAP.COMMENT: calculate monitoring end date of current period
calculate monitoring end date of current period
calculate monitoring end date of current period

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check status of springboot api call ---
--- Check if API returned Data or not ---
--- Check status of springboot api call ---
--- Check if API returned Data or not ---

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Api call is failure throw exception ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Api call is failure throw exception ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Map Current Period DB Doc and insert new Current period ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- map to period Input doc for current period ---
calculate monitoring end date of current period
calculate monitoring end date of current period
calculate monitoring end date of current period

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Future Periods creation. Find missing periods and create them ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: check size of the list and map size to availablePeriods variable

MAP.COMMENT: subtract size of data from futurePeriodCount

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Create Future periods based on available periods ---

MAP.NAME: futurePeriodCount<=0
MAP.COMMENT: --- Do Nothing, Future periods already available in periods table ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- All Future periods not available in DB ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Get the larget period number in DB ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: get the largest number from string list

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- current period missing --- create current period ---

Values.value: Current Period not found for challenge - %challengePeriods/challengeId%

INVOKE.COMMENT: --- Get All Challenge Periods from DB ---

MAP.COMMENT: --- Sort periods in desc order of period No. to find last period ---
--- Map period no. of last period ---
--- map to period Input doc for current period ---
calculate monitoring end date of current period
calculate monitoring end date of current period
calculate monitoring end date of current period

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Check how many new future periods have to be created and create them ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: check size of the list and map size to availablePeriods variable

MAP.COMMENT: subtract size of data from futurePeriodCount

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Create Future periods based on available periods ---

MAP.NAME: futurePeriodCount<=0
MAP.COMMENT: --- Do Nothing, Future periods already available in periods table ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- All Future periods not available in DB ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Get the larget period number in DB ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: get the largest number from string list

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
